title: ajuga sciaphila
intro: Ajuga sciaphila, also known as Bugleweed or Sciaphila, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antispasmodic and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Ajuga sciaphila are numerous, as it is believed to help reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and even lower blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
